chapter_title.en: Chapter 55 – The merits of the meat

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/127)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/127)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) اللَّحْمُ سَيِّدُ الطَّعَامِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhamad Bin Bundar, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Isa Bin Abdullah Al Alawy, from his father, from his grandfather,
(It has been narrated) from Ali<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The meat is the chief of the foods in the world and the Hereafter’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Bandar has narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Muhammad ibn Ali from ‘Isa ibn ‘Abd Allah al-‘Alawiy from his father from his grandfather who has said the following: “Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Meat is the master food in this world and in the next life. 5 ”
